name: qlink-interface

metadata.name: qlink-interface
metadata.summary: Interface definition of link layer for quantum networks

documentation:
QLink-Interface (1.0.0)
=====================================================

Welcome to QLink-Interface's README.

To install the package do:
```bash
make install
```

To verify the installation do:
```
make verify
```

This package defines the service interface of the link layer and provides a magic link layer protocol.
For details about this interface and specific header fields see the paper:
* A Link Layer Protocol for Quantum Networks
  https://arxiv.org/abs/1903.09778
and the QIRG draft:
* The Link Layer service in a Quantum Internet
  https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum

modules.name: qlink_interface.interface
documentation:
This defines the service interface of the link layer and provides a magic link layer protocol.
For details about this interface and specific header fields see the paper:

* A Link Layer Protocol for Quantum Networks
  https://arxiv.org/abs/1903.09778

and the QIRG draft:

* The Link Layer service in a Quantum Internet
  https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum

functions.name: qlink_interface.interface.get_creator_node_id
documentation: Returns the node ID of the node that submitted the given create request

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.remote_node_id
documentation: ID of the node to create entanglement with

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.minimum_fidelity
documentation: the desired minimum fidelity, between 0 and 1

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.time_unit
documentation: 0 for microseconds, 1 for milliseconds, 2 for seconds

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.max_time
documentation: the maximum number of "time_unit"s the higher layer is willing to wait for the request

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.purpose_id
documentation: allows higher layer to tag request for a specific purpose

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.number
documentation: number of entangled pairs to generate

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.priority
documentation: large value indicates this request is of high priority and should be fulfilled early

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.atomic
documentation: should entangled qubits be available in memory at the same time?

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateBase.consecutive
documentation: should entangled pairs be created close in time?

Base for "create" requests. Not a supported request type itself.

Note
----
Based on figure 1 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqCreateAndKeep
documentation:
Request to generate entanglement and store it in memory.

Note
----
Based on figure 1 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.RandomBasis
documentation: Choice of random bases sets

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.BellState
documentation: What Bell state is generated

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.random_basis_local
documentation: What random basis set to sample from (local)

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.random_basis_remote
documentation: What random basis set to sample from (remote)

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.x_rotation_angle_local_1
documentation: local qubit initial X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.y_rotation_angle_local
documentation: local qubit Y rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.x_rotation_angle_local_2
documentation: local qubit final X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.x_rotation_angle_remote_1
documentation: remote qubit initial X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.y_rotation_angle_remote
documentation: remote qubit Y rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.x_rotation_angle_remote_2
documentation: remote qubit final X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.probability_distribution_parameter_local_1
documentation: probability of measuring local qubit in first basis

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.probability_distribution_parameter_remote_1
documentation: probability of measuring remote qubit in first basis

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.probability_distribution_parameter_local_2
documentation: probability of measuring local qubit in second basis

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqMeasureDirectly.probability_distribution_parameter_remote_2
documentation: probability of measuring remote qubit in 2nd basis

Request to measure directly.

Measurement bases can be manipulated by performing a general rotation on a qubit before measurement.
Any rotation can be decomposes into first an X rotation, then an Y rotation, and then another X rotation.
By specifying the three corresponding angles (these are Euler angles), the pre-measurement rotation is specified.

Note
----
Based on figure 1 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.random_basis_local
documentation: What random basis set to sample from (local)

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.x_rotation_angle_local_1
documentation: local qubit initial X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.y_rotation_angle_local
documentation: local qubit Y rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.x_rotation_angle_local_2
documentation: local qubit final X rotation

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.probability_distribution_parameter_local_1
documentation: probability of measuring local qubit in first basis

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqRemoteStatePrep.probability_distribution_parameter_local_2
documentation: probability of measuring local qubit in second basis

Request for remote state preparation.

Measurement bases can be manipulated by performing a general rotation on a qubit before measurement.
Any rotation can be decomposes into first an X rotation, then an Y rotation, and then another X rotation.
By specifying the three corresponding angles (these are Euler angles), the pre-measurement rotation is specified.

Note
----
Based on figure 1 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqReceive
documentation: Request to be ready for entanglement generation.

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ReqStopReceive
documentation: Request to stop being ready for entanglement generation.

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.create_id
documentation: the same as the Create ID returned to the requester

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.directionality_flag
documentation: Specifies if the request came from this node (D=0) or the remote node (D=1)

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.sequence_number
documentation: a sequence number for identifiying the entangled pair

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.purpose_id
documentation: purpose ID of the request

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.remote_node_id
documentation: used if connected to multiple nodes

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.goodness
documentation: an estimate of the fidelity of the generated pair

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreate.bell_state
documentation: index of the created Bell state # TODO add mapping

Base for different "create" responses. Not a response that is used itself.

Note
----
Based on Figures 3, 4 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol)

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreateAndKeep

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreateAndKeep.logical_qubit_id
documentation: logical qubit id where the entanglement is stored

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResCreateAndKeep.time_of_goodness
documentation: time of the goodness estimate

Response corresponding to create and keep request.

Note
----
Based on Figure 3 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResMeasureDirectly

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResMeasureDirectly.measurement_outcome
documentation: outcome of the measurement performed on the entangled pair

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResMeasureDirectly.measurement_basis
documentation: which basis the entangled pair was measured in

Response corresponding to create and measure request.

Note
----
Based on Figure 4 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResRemoteStatePrep.measurement_outcome
documentation: outcome of the measurement performed on the entangled pair

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResRemoteStatePrep.measurement_basis
documentation: which basis the entangled pair was measured in

Response corresponding to create and measure request.

Note
----
Based on Figure 4 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).

classes.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.create_id
documentation: the same as the Create ID returned to the requester

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.error_code
documentation: the error that occured in the EGP

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.use_sequence_number_range
documentation: specifies whether a range of sequence numbers should be expired

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.sequence_number_low
documentation: lower bound of range of sequence numbers to expire

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.sequence_number_high
documentation: upper bound of range of sequence numbers to expire

class_variables.name: qlink_interface.interface.ResError.origin_node_id
documentation: used if the node is directly connected to multiple nodes

Response when an error occurs.

Note
----
Based on Figure 5 of https://tools.ietf.org/pdf/draft-dahlberg-ll-quantum-03.pdf (updated link-layer protocol).
